text: It was stated that dreaming, if made available to the conscious mind, will aid greatly in polarization. Could you define dreaming or tell us what it is and how it aids in polarization. A dreaming is an activity of communication through the veil of the unconscious mind and the conscious mind. The nature of this activity is wholly dependent upon the situation regarding the energy center, blockages, activations, and crystallizations of a given mind, body, spirit complex in one who is blocked at two of the three allower energy ascenters. Dreaming will be of value in the polarization process, in that there will be a repetition of those portions of a recent catalyst as a well as a deeper held ablockages, thereby giving the awakening mind clues as to the nature of these blockages and hints as two possible changes in the perception which may lead to the unwalking this type of adreaming or communication through the veiled portions of the mind occurs also with those mind, body, spirit complexes which are functioning with a far less blockage and enjoying the green array activation or higher activation at those times at which the mind, body, spirit, complex experiences, catalyst momentarily reablocking or baffling, or otherwise distorting the flow of energy influx. Therefore, in all cases, it is useful to a mind, body, spirit complex to ponder the content and emotive resonance of dreams for those whose green array energy centers have been activated as well as for those whose green ray energy centers are offered an unusual unblockage due to extreme catalyst, such as what is termed the physical death of the self or a one which is a beloved occurring in what you may call your anir, a future, a dreaming, a takes on another activity. This is what may loosely be termed precommission or a knowing which is prior to that which shall occur in a physical manifestation in your a yellow ray. This property of the mind depends upon its placement to a great extent in a time, a space. So that the terms of a present and a future and a past have no meaning. Enable this entity to enter more fully into the all-compassionate love of each and every circumstance, including those circumstances against which an entity may have a strong distortion towards what you may call unhappiness. As a mind, a body, a spirit consciously chooses the path of the adept and with each energy a center, a balanced to a minimal degree, begins to open the indigo array energy center, the so cold dreaming becomes the most efficient tool for polarization, for if it is known by the adept that a work may be done in consciousness while the so-called conscious mind rests. With these affirmations attended to the activity of dreaming reaches that potential of learn teaching, which is most helpful to increasing the distortions of the adept towards its chosen polarity. Not so closely aligned with the increase in polarity, which we do not cover at this particular space time.

segment.segment: It was stated that dreaming, if made available to the conscious mind, will aid greatly in polarization.
Could you define dreaming or tell us what it is and how it aids in polarization.
A dreaming is an activity of communication through the veil of the unconscious mind and the conscious mind.

The nature of this activity is wholly dependent upon the situation regarding the energy center, blockages, activations, and crystallizations of a given mind, body, spirit complex in one who is blocked at two of the three allower energy ascenters.

Dreaming will be of value in the polarization process, in that there will be a repetition of those portions of a recent catalyst as a well as a deeper held ablockages, thereby giving the awakening mind clues as to the nature of these blockages and hints as two possible changes in the perception which may lead to the unwalking this type of adreaming or communication through the veiled portions of the mind occurs also with those mind, body, spirit complexes which are functioning with a far less blockage and enjoying the green array activation or higher activation at those times at which the mind, body, spirit, complex experiences, catalyst momentarily reablocking or baffling, or otherwise distorting the flow of energy influx.

Therefore, in all cases, it is useful to a mind, body, spirit complex to ponder the content and emotive resonance of dreams for those whose green array energy centers have been activated as well as for those whose green ray energy centers are offered an unusual unblockage due to extreme catalyst, such as what is termed the physical death of the self or a one which is a beloved occurring in what you may call your anir, a future, a dreaming, a takes on another activity.
This is what may loosely be termed precommission or a knowing which is prior to that which shall occur in a physical manifestation in your a yellow ray.
This property of the mind depends upon its placement to a great extent in a time, a space.
So that the terms of a present and a future and a past have no meaning.

Enable this entity to enter more fully into the all-compassionate love of each and every circumstance, including those circumstances against which an entity may have a strong distortion towards what you may call unhappiness.

As a mind, a body, a spirit consciously chooses the path of the adept and with each energy a center, a balanced to a minimal degree, begins to open the indigo array energy center, the so cold dreaming becomes the most efficient tool for polarization, for if it is known by the adept that a work may be done in consciousness while the so-called conscious mind rests.
With these affirmations attended to the activity of dreaming reaches that potential of learn teaching, which is most helpful to increasing the distortions of the adept towards its chosen polarity.
Not so closely aligned with the increase in polarity, which we do not cover at this particular space time.
